message:
feat(wasm): add debug tracing instrumentation to WASM export calls and memory buffer reads

Add structured debug logging to the WASM runtime bindings to aid in
diagnosing performance issues and debugging WASM module interactions:

- Export function calls (callExport): log start event with instance_id,
  export name, and argument count; log completion event with elapsed_ms
  timing
- Memory buffer reads (getMemoryBuffer): log instance_id, memory name,
  buffer length in bytes, and elapsed_ms timing
- Import std::time::Instant for high-resolution timing

These debug-level traces are zero-cost in release builds when debug
logging is disabled, but provide essential visibility when investigating
WASM execution bottlenecks or timeout issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
